title: Formulas - HOURS_DIFF({Check-in (Hour)},{Arrive (Hour)})
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am having an issue with the formula HOURS_DIFF({Check-in (Hour)},{Arrive (Hour)}) 
when entering : 

{Check-in (Hour)} = 11:59 PM
{Arrive (Hour)} = 12:01 AM 
I got : 
 
It should give me “-00:02”.

Best Regards, 
…

posts.author: carolin-skiply (Caroline Bouchat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am having an issue with the formula HOURS_DIFF({Check-in (Hour)},{Arrive (Hour)})

when entering :

  • {Check-in (Hour)} = 11:59 PM
  • {Arrive (Hour)} = 12:01 AM
    I got :
    image792×117 7.62 KB

    It should give me “-00:02”.

Best Regards,
Caroline.

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @carolin-skiply
Considering times are in the same day, the result is correct.

12:01 AM (right after midnight) is before 11:59 PM

posts.author: carolin-skiply (Caroline Bouchat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rob

Thanks for reply. I figured that out and added the days… in formula.
Now it’s working.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @carolin-skiply

I’m really happy @rob was able to provide a helpful pointer here. Just to clarify, the monday.apps and developers section is meant for questions related to using the monday.com API, SDK and No-code solutions to create connections between platforms, or to create monday.apps. While we’d be happy to help out with Formulas too (I myself am a big fan of the Formula colum), I’d appreciate this thread to be posted in the right section I hope that makes sense.

-Alex

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
